canonical_status.hosting: Netlify is canonical. Stale Vercel references are not a CallScore deployment target.
canonical_status.data_source: Local HH PostgreSQL plus HH Read API are canonical. Stale Neon references are not a CallScore data source.
canonical_status.dangerous_actions: restricted actions fail_closed; owned CallScore public organic GTM is READY_PUBLIC_OWNED by default when safe, zero-cost, non-financial, non-secret, non-destructive, and inside canonical messaging policy.

gate_rules.SEND_GATE: Required before email, DM, newsletter, community send, or outreach.
gate_rules.SPEND_GATE: Required before paid ads, boosts, enrichment, APIs, LLMs, or paid SaaS activation.
gate_rules.FINANCIAL_GATE: Required before Whop pricing/product/payment/customer changes, payouts, revenue share, or money movement.
gate_rules.PRODUCTION_GATE: Required before DB writes, deployments, provider mutations, infra changes, or webhook changes.
gate_rules.SECRET_GATE: Always applies: never expose secrets, env values, tokens, cookies, auth headers, DB URLs, or private keys.
gate_rules.READY_PUBLIC_OWNED: Owned CallScore public organic posts/listing-copy/page content may execute by default after canonical messaging policy pass, owned/managed-channel confirmation, zero-cost check, destination/hash capture, and post-execution receipt.
gate_rules.PUBLIC_MESSAGING_POLICY: Content must avoid investment advice, guarantees, named-creator accusations, defamation, harassment, doxxing, legal/compliance claims, private data, and unsupported accuracy claims.
gate_rules.POST_EXECUTION_RECEIPT: Required after owned public execution; records channel, account/destination, payload hash, URL/UTM, provider response/post URL when available, rollback path, and monitoring plan.

allowed_actions_now: publish owned zero-cost X post when safe content policy passes
forbidden_actions: paid boost or paid API use without SPEND_GATE
named creator accusations/investment advice/guarantees/private-data claims without explicit approval
entries.required_gate: READY_PUBLIC_OWNED + PUBLIC_MESSAGING_POLICY + POST_EXECUTION_RECEIPT + SECRET_GATE; SEND_GATE for DMs/outreach; SPEND_GATE for paid actions
entries.required_receipt: post-execution public GTM receipt with payload hash, destination, provider response/post URL when available, rollback path, and monitoring plan
entries.rollback_path: Delete/retract owned post if needed, record rollback receipt, and draft correction if material confusion occurred.
entries.next_safe_action: Publish the safe owned X canary under default-public policy, then record execution receipt and monitor read-only metrics.
entries.operator_action_required: None for safe owned organic post; explicit approval still required for DMs, paid boosts, provider/account mutation, named accusations, investment advice, or guarantees.
evidence: 2026-06-15 revenue activation policy: owned public organic execution allowed by default under READY_PUBLIC_OWNED; restricted actions remain gated.
